description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring a cluster of large, glossy green leaves with deep, irregular splits, reminiscent of a Monstera or split-leaf philodendron. The leaves are attached to long, slender, dark stems that arch outward from a central base. The plant is housed in a round, dark gray ceramic pot with a subtle horizontal banded pattern. The pot appears to be solid and slightly reflective, with a smooth finish. The overall arrangement is asymmetrical, with some leaves extending higher and others drooping lower, giving the plant a dynamic, natural appearance. This type of plant is commonly used to add a touch of greenery and modern style to urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A potted plant with large, split green leaves on long stems, set in a round, dark gray ceramic pot with subtle banding. The plant has an airy, asymmetrical arrangement and a modern decorative look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's tallest leaf upright and several large, split leaves fanning outward from the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated leaf extending farthest from the pot and the pot's banded texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with most leaves angled away, revealing the pot's round shape and the arching stems.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cluster of leaves and the pot's smooth, dark surface.
